Gamepad Navigation Demo

\r\n\r\n
\r\n

Controls

\r\n
    \r\n
  • \r\n D-pad - Navigate focus\r\n spatially / Move text cursor\r\n
    • \r\n
  • \r\n L1 /\r\n R1 - Previous / Next\r\n (Tab-like)\r\n
    • \r\n
  • \r\n L2 /\r\n R2 - Focus before/after\r\n scrollable container\r\n
    • \r\n
  • \r\n X - Click / Editor Mode\r\n Toggle / Hold X for\r\n voice-to-text\r\n
    • \r\n
  • \r\n Square - Cancel /\r\n Delete character / Uncheck checkbox\r\n
    • \r\n
  • \r\n Right Stick - Scroll\r\n the focused container (vertical & horizontal)\r\n
    • \r\n
\r\n\r\n

Editor Mode

\r\n
    \r\n
  • Date Input: D-pad up/down = day, left/right = month
    • \r\n
  • Color Picker: D-pad up/down = hue, left/right = luminance
    • \r\n
  • Range Input: D-pad left/right = ±1, up/down = ±10
    • \r\n
  • \r\n Number Input: D-pad up/down changes value (respects step/min/max)\r\n
    • \r\n
